page_metadata.biotools__summary: Web-server that allows users to interactively query, visualize and interrogate molecular networks in the context of stem cell biology. It includes a comprehensive set of physical and regulatory interactions for both human and mouse. Any retrieved network can be readily examined for the presence of genes linked to stemness.
